mapper.sql: I.ITEM_ID, I.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, I.LOCATION_ID, L.LOCATION_NAME, I.ITEM_NAME, I.ITEM_CODE, I.UNIT, I.MIN_QTY, I.STATUS, TO_CHAR(I.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT
FROM ITEM I LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON I.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN LOCATION L ON I.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITEM ( ITEM_ID, CATEGORY_ID, LOCATION_ID, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_CODE, UNIT, MIN_QTY, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{categoryId}, #{locationId}, #{itemName}, #{itemCode}, #{unit}, #{minQty}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ITEM
ITEM_NAME = #{itemName},
CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId},
LOCATION_ID = #{locationId},
UNIT = #{unit},
MIN_QTY = #{minQty},
STATUS = #{status},
WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
